title: ENIAC’s Architects Wove Stories Through Computing
summary: This year marks the 80th anniversary of ENIAC, the first general-purpose digital computer. Mauchly, its co-inventor, and Kathleen “Kay” McNulty, one of the six original programmers—married a few years after its completion and raised seven children together.
